# ADR Template

Use this for architectural or product-technical decisions that should survive beyond a single task.

## Title

`[Decision title]`

## Status

- Proposed / Accepted / Superseded

## Context

What problem forced this decision?

## Decision

State the decision in one or two clear sentences.

## Consequences

Positive:

- `[impact]`

Negative or tradeoffs:

- `[impact]`

## Alternatives considered

- `[alternative and why it was rejected]`
